articles.title: DESIGN. JOIN THEM
articles.summary: Every product team is building with AI now. The designers who can research, prototype, and ship AI-powered experiences — not just make them look nice — are the ones getting pulled into the room early.

articles.title: * Building scalable UI systems for AI products
articles.summary: * Telling your design story in a portfolio that stands out

articles.title: CANVA ACQUIRES STARTUPS WORKING ON ANIMATION AND MARKETING
articles.summary: Canva has acquired animation startup Cavalry and marketing AI company MangoAI to expand its creative and advertising capabilities. Cavalry's 2D motion tools will be added to Affinity, giving Canva a more complete professional suite that now includes motion editing alongside photo, vector, and layout design. MangoAI's reinforcement learning technology aims to improve video ad performance and measurement, strengthening Canva's push into marketing as it builds on tools like Canva Grow and MagicBrief.

articles.title: OPKEY LAUNCHES DESIGN STUDIO TO AUTOMATE ENTERPRISE CLOUD APPLICATION DISCOVERY AND DESIGN
articles.summary: Opkey launched Design Studio, an AI-powered suite that automates enterprise cloud application discovery and design processes from statement-of-work creation through configuration. The platform uses Argus, a domain-specific AI model trained on over 200 terabytes of enterprise application data, to manage the entire application lifecycle and reduce manual work. Opkey claims the system can accelerate Oracle and Workday implementations by up to 50% while reducing delivery effort and improving project margins for systems integrators.

articles.title: BLUESKY DARK MODE AVAILABLE ON MOBILE AND WEB
articles.summary: Bluesky offers Light, Dim, Dark, and System appearance options across iOS, Android, web, and desktop, letting users manually choose a theme or sync with their device's dark mode schedule. Dark mode can improve comfort in low light and save battery life—especially on OLED screens—while Dim provides a softer alternative. If issues arise, updating the app or checking system-wide dark settings usually resolves them.

articles.title: HOW I'M DEALING WITH THE PRESSURE TO ADOPT AI AS A DESIGNER
articles.summary: A designer overcame AI-related career anxiety by realizing his control over which AI tools to adopt based on whether they improve work quality. With the development of a "six-month rule", he was able to avoid hype cycles by waiting to see which AI tools remain relevant and useful after initial excitement fades. The key is to focus on actual work outcomes rather than industry noise, and to experiment with tools broadly but only implement those that genuinely enhance results.

articles.title: YOUR AI FEATURE WORKS. SO WHY DON'T USERS CARE?
articles.summary: Transparency alone isn't enough to build trust in AI. Real adoption depends on aligning AI features with users' existing mental models, habits, comfort zones, and cognitive limits. To move beyond early adopters, AI must fit how people already think and work—starting with low-stakes, “outsource-safe” tasks, mirroring familiar workflows, managing expectations clearly, and respecting human pace—because trust begins with alignment, not just explanation.

articles.title: DESIGNING PRODUCTION-READY UIS WITH YOUR DESIGN SYSTEM USING MOONCHILD AI
articles.summary: Using Moonchild's new Design System feature significantly accelerated MVP development for a restaurant management product by establishing a mini design system—tokens, components, and visual rules—before generating UI screens. This system-first approach ensured strong visual consistency, reduced iteration waste, improved design-to-code alignment, and, combined with ChatGPT for research and Antigravity for frontend implementation, resulted in a workflow nearly 10x faster than previous AI-driven methods.

articles.title: DESIGN AT THE SPEED OF LIGHT
articles.summary: Vecti is a collaborative UX design tool that enables real-time team collaboration and transforms complex workflows into intuitive visual solutions.

articles.title: WALL OF PORTFOLIOS
articles.summary: Explore designer portfolios by category, experience level, job title, and location, and showcase your own work globally.

articles.title: AI IMAGE GENERATOR
articles.summary: Generate high-quality images from text instantly. Powered by Z-Image-Base for quality and Z-Image-Turbo for speed.

articles.title: HOW TO DESIGN FOR TRANSPARENT SCREENS
articles.summary: David Allin Reese, a Senior Visual Designer at Google, shares insights on designing Jetpack Compose Glimmer, a new design system for AI glasses that projects interfaces onto transparent displays. The unique challenges included designing without traditional screen boundaries, where the interface appears at arm's length in the user's field of view and requires conscious shifts in focus from the real world. Key technical constraints included additive display technology and the need to rethink fundamental design elements such as color, typography, and shadows.

articles.title: WHAT A UX AUDIT REALLY REVEALS ABOUT YOUR PRODUCT'S PERFORMANCE
articles.summary: A UX Audit systematically evaluates a digital product to identify usability issues, structural weaknesses, and friction points that hurt conversions, engagement, and growth. It examines real user behavior through heuristic evaluation, analytics data, and qualitative insights. The audit prioritizes findings by business impact and transforms them into a strategic roadmap, enabling teams to make evidence-based improvements.

articles.title: WHY READING ON MOBILE IS UNIQUELY CHALLENGING
articles.summary: Mobile reading happens in distracted, fragmented conditions, which significantly reduces comprehension. Research shows understanding can drop from about 39% on desktop to just 19% on mobile. Cloze tests, which measure whether readers can reconstruct missing words from context, reveal how easily meaning breaks down on small screens and highlight the need for simpler, clearer writing—especially for high-stakes content—because mobile usability isn't just about layout, but about whether people truly understand what they read when attention is limited.

articles.title: STUNNING PAINTERLY FANTASY WORLDS AND CREATURES BY BRITISH CONCEPT ARTIST THOMAS CHAMBERLAIN‑KEEN
articles.summary: British concept artist Thomas Chamberlain-Keen creates intricate, painterly fantasy worlds and creature designs while freelancing for Riot Games.

articles.title: WHAT EVERY DESIGNER CAN LEARN FROM THE OLYMPIC MEDALS DISASTER
articles.summary: The 2026 Milan Winter Olympics medals repeatedly fell apart during medal ceremonies, with athletes' medals breaking on camera as they celebrated their victories.

articles.title: VICKILICIOUS: THE TATTOO ART BRAND THAT FEEDS ITS CREATOR'S SOUL
articles.summary: South Wales–based designer Vicki Ashurst founded Vickilicious, a tattoo culture–inspired brand born from personal loss and creative rediscovery.
